description.value: Price 3,150 gp; Slot none; CL 1st; Weight â; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION This small silver cylinder is no bigger than a pinhead and is engraved with an Elven aphorism that roughly translates to âunhindered flight.â A silver nocking point can be attached to the string of any bow or crossbow. When using a weapon equipped with a silver nocking point, a character can treat penalties for wind conditions as though they were one step less severe. For example, a character firing a ranged projectile in severe wind conditions would fire at a ranged penalty of â2 instead of â4. Magical wind effects that would normally deflect the projectile (such as fickle winds ) instead impose only a â8 penalty on the attack roll.
